body.title: uucompactclaude: add second Enter after /model haiku for idle robustness
body.intention: I intend that the model-switch command reliably sends in tmux even when the pane is in an idle state.
body.description:
uucompactclaude sends /model haiku + Enter but single Enter can be swallowed when the pane is mid-idle. Adding a second Enter after 1s sleep makes the command reliable.

**Affected files:** lab/claudecode/uucompactclaude
**Design rules:** none
**Scope boundary:** IN — add second Enter keypress; OUT — any other autocompact logic
**Completion criteria:** uucompactclaude script has two Enter keypresses after /model haiku
